mapper.select: /* CartMapper.getShopCartItemList: 쇼핑몰 장바구니 목록 조회 */ SELECT C.CART_ID , C.CART_GB_CD , C.CUST_NO , C.GOODS_ID , GB.BRAND_NO , BB.BRAND_NM , GB.GOODS_NM , C.SIZE_ID , C.QTY , GB.SUPPLY_AMT , GB.SALE_AMT , GS.ADD_AMT , C.EXHIBITION_NO , ( SELECT GI.IMG_PATH FROM GOODS_IMG GI WHERE GI.GOODS_ID = C.GOODS_ID ORDER BY GI.DISP_ORD ASC, GI.IMG_NO ASC LIMIT 1 ) AS IMG_PATH FROM CART C JOIN GOODS_BASE GB ON GB.GOODS_ID = C.GOODS_ID JOIN GOODS_SIZE GS ON GS.GOODS_ID = C.GOODS_ID AND GS.SIZE_ID = C.SIZE_ID LEFT JOIN BRAND_BASE BB ON BB.BRAND_NO = GB.BRAND_NO WHERE C.CUST_NO = #{custNo} AND C.CART_GB_CD = 'C' ORDER BY C.REG_DT DESC, C.CART_ID DESC, C.GOODS_ID DESC, C.SIZE_ID ASC

/* CartMapper.getShopCartItem: 쇼핑몰 장바구니 단건 조회 */ SELECT C.CART_ID , C.CART_GB_CD , C.CUST_NO , C.GOODS_ID , GB.BRAND_NO , BB.BRAND_NM , GB.GOODS_NM , C.SIZE_ID , C.QTY , GB.SUPPLY_AMT , GB.SALE_AMT , GS.ADD_AMT , C.EXHIBITION_NO , ( SELECT GI.IMG_PATH FROM GOODS_IMG GI WHERE GI.GOODS_ID = C.GOODS_ID ORDER BY GI.DISP_ORD ASC, GI.IMG_NO ASC LIMIT 1 ) AS IMG_PATH FROM CART C JOIN GOODS_BASE GB ON GB.GOODS_ID = C.GOODS_ID JOIN GOODS_SIZE GS ON GS.GOODS_ID = C.GOODS_ID AND GS.SIZE_ID = C.SIZE_ID LEFT JOIN BRAND_BASE BB ON BB.BRAND_NO = GB.BRAND_NO WHERE C.CUST_NO = #{custNo} AND C.CART_ID = #{cartId} AND C.CART_GB_CD = 'C' LIMIT 1

/* CartMapper.lockShopCartForUpdate: 동일 고객 일반 장바구니 쓰기 직렬화를 위한 범위 잠금 조회 */ SELECT CART_ID FROM CART FORCE INDEX (IDX_CART_01) WHERE CUST_NO = #{custNo} AND CART_GB_CD = 'C' ORDER BY CART_ID ASC FOR UPDATE
